name: project-with-reflect
description: A meta-skill that turns each of your projects, machines, and devices into its own lightweight, self-improving skill. Work through /<project>; it auto-logs the moments that matter; /<project>-reflect distills those logs into lean, readable rules so the next session starts smarter. Closed log -> reflect -> improve loop, modeled on hermes-agent and kept readable via grounding-rules.
